domain: Private AI-powered family culture and legacy platform

theme_and_archetype.description: Warm, intimate, premium editorial feel. Like a modern, global Indian family home or a luxury family memoir magazine. No religious or generic tech SaaS elements.

rules.headings: Elegant serif typography for emotional headlines. Use Cormorant Garamond, Playfair Display, or Spectral. Apply tight tracking (tracking-tight) for large headers.
rules.body: Clean modern sans-serif typography for body copy. Use Outfit, Manrope, or Satoshi. Must have generous line-height (leading-relaxed).
rules.labels: Uppercase, wide letter spacing (tracking-widest) for overlines and small labels.

background.description: Warm ivory or soft sand backgrounds.

text.description: Deep charcoal or dark forest-green text.

accents.description: Muted, organic accent colors to be used sparingly for borders, highlights, or small icons.

color_palette.rules: Avoid pure black and pure white. Avoid generic tech gradients. Use a subtle CSS noise texture overlay to create a soft paper grain effect.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_system: Generous spacing philosophy. Use p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, py-32. Elements must breathe. AVOID excessive cards and clutter.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense text. Headlines can be center-aligned if it creates a strong editorial composition. Asymmetry is encouraged to mimic magazine layouts.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Editorial multi-column grids. Use offset images and overlapping text. Example: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-16).
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Minimal borders (border-black/5 or border-[#2A312B]/10). Soft, diffuse shadows only where necessary to lift elements. Use flat rectangular layouts, no heavy rounded cards.

components.strategy: Custom HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout. Shadcn/UI for interactive forms, waitlist, and clickable mockups (heavily customized to match the editorial aesthetic).
components.navigation: Glassmorphism or solid warm background. Must include: Home, How It Works, The Family Archive, Privacy, For Families, Early Access. CTA: Begin Your Archive.
components.buttons: Elegant, understated. Use dark forest-green or charcoal background with warm ivory text. Add a subtle hover effect (opacity change or slow translation). No heavy shadows.
components.cards: Avoid standard SaaS cards. Use fine lines, 1px subtle borders, no background color change, or simply rely on proximity and negative space.
components.icons: Use 'lucide-react' or '@phosphor-icons/react' (light/thin weight). Keep them minimal.

motion_and_interaction.strategy: Slow, cinematic, and deliberate. Nothing should feel 'bouncy' or 'fast'.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Subtle color shifts, slow opacity fades (duration-300 or 500).
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Consider adding smooth scroll (Lenis) if possible. Fade-in up for text blocks, slow parallax for images.

media.strategy: Candid, intimate, multigenerational photography. No corporate SaaS illustrations.

hero_or_emotional.description: Cheerful family sitting on the grass, enjoying time outdoors together in a serene park. Use in Hero or Emotional Use-Cases section.

celebration.description: Group of people joyfully celebrating outdoors in vibrant traditional Indian clothing. Use for 'Our Traditions' or 'Our Diwali Morning' mockup context.

cooking_together.description: A family preparing a meal together in their kitchen. Use for 'Our Table' or family recipe feature section.

archival_memory.description: Photo of man with gray frame held by hand. Use for 'Our Roots' or problem section (fragments of memory).

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case, role-based naming convention (e.g., 'data-testid="waitlist-submit-button"').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI (.js/.jsx files).
Create a soft paper grain effect using a fixed CSS background with low-opacity noise, or apply a subtle SVG noise filter to the body.

Structure the landing page with the following sections: Hero (with Family Tradition Card mockup), Problem section, Five questions, Product experience, Feature showcase, AI section, Privacy, Emotional use-cases, Final CTA.

Include a separate clickable mockups area or pages for: Family Tradition Card, Grandmother voice-note story, Family calendar, Ask Aangan AI chat (mocking Claude Sonnet 4.5), Family recipe card, My Aangan dashboard.
Ensure the Ask Aangan AI demo feels live and interactive.
Implement the waitlist saving to a mocked database (or local storage for the demo).
Strictly follow the color palette (Warm ivory, Charcoal/Forest-green, terracotta/marigold/sage accents). No BANNED elements like saffron-heavy or marketplace visuals.
Apply data-testid to every button, form input, and key navigation link.
